name: Out of Nowhere
short_description: Be in control of a dog in an adventure action horror game set in a full of mysteries fantasy medieval open world where aliens took over and there is no one left to help you. Explore the different areas to find out how to defeat them.
detailed_description:
Be in control of a dog in an adventure action horror game. Set in a fantasy medieval open world full of mysteries where aliens took over and there is no one left to help you. Explore the different areas of the map to find out how to defeat them.

Out of Nowhere is developed by one passionate brazilian who wants to create a short but unforgettable experience for everyone.
about_the_game:
Be in control of a dog in an adventure action horror game. Set in a fantasy medieval open world full of mysteries where aliens took over and there is no one left to help you. Explore the different areas of the map to find out how to defeat them.

supported_languages:
English*, Portuguese - Portugal*, Portuguese - Brazil*, Japanese*, Russian*, Simplified Chinese*
*languages with full audio support
